caption: Meet Maya, a radiant professor who lights up the cozy university library with her striking presence. Her silhouette is highlighted by warm natural light and the soft blue palette, making her both a scholar and a goddess. Her outfit, a crisp blouse and tailored trousers, accent her bust and backside, turning heads in every lecture 👩‍🏫📚🌟 #university #teachers #students #sexy #library
